subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of Baha! What shall my pen recount? What shall I think? From the earliest days of the Cause, the Ancient Beauty, the Most Great Name
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء چه نویسم و چه اندیشم جمال قدم و اسم اعظم روحی لاحبائه الفدا از
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
